name: code-review
description: Java/Spring Boot code-review orchestrator. Reviews local branch diffs vs main and GitHub PRs by dispatching parallel sub-skill checks (relational-db, mongo-as-logging, redis, rabbitmq, transactional-faults, race-conditions, spring-framework, security, performance, error-handling+disk-writes, test-coverage, code-quality, config-dependencies) and returning line-anchored findings.
